news.title: The supermarket oven chips taste test: ‘These are a good, cheap option if you prefer not to buy ultra-processed products’
news.description: Remember when most kitchens had a deep-fat fryer on hand for the making of chips? Those days are long gone and there can be few who miss them, or the attendant risk of burning the house down while making the family dinner.

news.title: We are working with global oil producers, consumers to maintain stability in energy markets: US treasury secretary
news.description: As the West Asia conflict strains the global oil supply chain, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the Trump administration is working with the world's largest oil producers, consumers, and refiners to maintain stability in the energy markets.

news.title: Orbital data center company to start mining Bitcoin in space
news.description: Starcloud, an Nvidia-backed orbital data center startup, said it will connect Bitcoin ASICs to mine the cryptocurrency in space when its second spacecraft launches later this year.

news.title: Foxconn's deep Nvidia ties and full-stack integration fuel AI server ambitions
news.description: Foxconn chairman Young Liu said the company expects robust growth in 2026, driven by recovering consumer electronics demand and expanding AI-related business. He expressed strong confidence in Foxconn's AI server shipments and market share prospects.

news.title: Industry mulls thicker HBM standards for 20-layer stacks
news.description: Global semiconductor companies are discussing relaxing thickness standards for next-generation high-bandwidth memory (HBM) as the industry moves toward higher stack counts in future designs, according to ZDNet Korea.

news.title: US weighs global AI chip export licensing to curb third-country diversion
news.description: The White House is reportedly drafting a new regulatory framework that would tighten US oversight of global AI chip exports. This move could reshape how advanced computing power is distributed worldwide.
